questionHtml:
The intensity of a wave can be defined as the energy per unit area per unit time. What is the unit of intensity expressed in fundamental SI units?

A.  kg m−2 s−1

B.  kg m2 s−3

C.  kg s−2

D.  kg s−3

meta.title: The intensity of a wave can be defined as the energy per unit area per unit time. What is the unit of intensity expressed in fundamental SI units? A. kg m−2 s−1 B. kg m2 s−3 C. kg
